title: Airstrike Mod
description: Unleash the fury of the skies with Airstrike Mod! Add precision airstrikes, massive bombs, smoke bombings, and cruise missiles to your Minecraft world.
body:
![Main picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6ac43093d1abe149eaa743f1c33b93c01004b23.webp)

# 📑 Description

Elevate your Minecraft gameplay with the Airstrike Mod, adding intense aerial warfare capabilities. Execute airstrikes with precision using a laser designator, from devastating large bombs to strategic smoke bombings. Additionally, unleash a cruise missile that flies in four directions, enhancing your strategic options. Airstrike Mod is your gateway to dynamic combat and enhanced tactical gameplay in Minecraft

# 🪖 Types of armaments

### Area Bombardment with Small Bombs

This feature allows for a sweeping airstrike over a 50x50 area, deploying 300 small bombs. These bombs cause localized damage, ideal for clearing out large areas of enemies or structures without causing extensive destruction to the landscape.

![Area Bombardment with Small Bombs](https://i.postimg.cc/6Q5P2M52/online-video-cutter-com.gif)

### Precision Strike with a Large Bomb

Execute a targeted strike with unparalleled accuracy, using a single large bomb capable of hitting with precision within 1 block. Ideal for taking out key targets or structures with minimal collateral damage.

![Precision Strike with a Large Bomb](https://i.postimg.cc/XY7Jq0Fw/image.gif)

### Massive Bombardment

This devastating airstrike unleashes 25 large bombs over a 100x100 area, inflicting tremendous damage to both the landscape and living targets. It's capable of penetrating deep layers of earth and stone, ideal for reshaping large areas or breaching fortified positions.

![Massive Bombardment](https://i.postimg.cc/mgxVSS3D/online-video-cutter-com.gif)

### Cruise Missile

Place the missile and orient it in one of four directions using a right-click, then launch it with a special activator. The cruise missile flies at high speed until it encounters an obstacle, at which point it explodes with a force greater than that of a large bomb. Just 2-3 cruise missiles are enough to obliterate a small mountain and everything on it.

![Cruise Missile](https://i.postimg.cc/y8W0q3VR/image.gif)

### Smoke Bomb Airstrike

Cover a 50x50 area with a dense cloud of smoke for approximately 10 minutes. Ideal for obscuring vision, providing cover for strategic maneuvers, or disorienting enemies during combat scenarios

![Smoke Bomb Airstrike](https://i.postimg.cc/1XJv9gfq/1.gif)

### Chemical Bomb Airstrike

Deploy a toxic cloud over a 50x50 area with poisonous substances, necessitating the use of a gas mask for survival. The chemicals are lethal for 5 minutes.

Following up with an Area Bombardment with Small Bombs after a chemical attack, when the enemy is weakened and has lost health, leaves them with virtually no chance of survival. This combination is a powerful strategy for area denial and ensuring enemy casualties, by first disorienting and damaging with chemicals, then finishing off with explosive force.

![Chemical Bomb Airstrike](https://i.postimg.cc/c4v6Wrky/Gif-Merge-854x480.gif)

# 🥽 Gas Mask Protection

Shields the wearer from the toxic cloud during chemical attacks, degrading over time when equipped. A gas mask lasts for approximately 5 minutes of use without repairs. To repair a gas mask, combine it with a filter in crafting or, while equipped, right-click with a filter in hand.

# ⚙️ Recipes
![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6b3a60cc19da9bda8aa6bbbba4b2c9770a83ab3.png)
